title: Two-layer deterministic dedup for auto-drafted decisions (pre-gate + review-flag)
context: Human records a decision via MCP, then commits code → post-commit hook auto-drafts the same choice under a new commit-keyed id. Measured 7 of 14 queued drafts as duplicates of this pattern, polluting the decision queue. Touches invariant(s): con_2ce3f2a547 (Synthesis must run on the Claude subscription, never the pay-per-token API: strip ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN from the spawned env).
decision: Implement two deterministic (model-free) layers: (1) commitCoveredBy() pre-draft gate in syncCommit — if a recent human-confirmed decision (≤14 days) covers ≥60% of the commit's files + rough subject match, skip the draft entirely (saves LLM call). (2) draftDuplicateOf() review-time flag — detect near-duplicates already in store using Jaccard term similarity + file overlap, threshold 0.35 for batch-reject. Both use deterministic term extraction (≥4 chars, non-stopwords) so their notion of 'similar' agrees.
consequences: Prevents re-drafting the same choice when human decision + code commit happen within 14 days of each other
Saves LLM subscription calls by gating on file coverage, not waiting for synthesis
Humans can batch-reject flagged duplicates via --reject-duplicates; decision queue stays clean
Requires maintenance of deterministic similarity metrics (Jaccard, file overlap logic) going forward
14-day window must be tuned: wide enough for record-then-commit workflows, narrow enough that revisiting same files next month drafts normally
alternatives_rejected: Post-hoc deduplication only — still synthesizes & stores the duplicate before flagging it
LLM-based similarity — not deterministic, costs compute, harder to debug/audit, human vouch (dec_a466655539) harder to preserve
Treat duplicates as revisions rather than rejects — loses the decision record, muddies intent
No pre-draft gate, only review-time review — doubles synthesis work and queue pollution for high-frequency patterns

rejected_tripwires.alternative: Post-hoc deduplication only — still synthesizes & stores the duplicate before flagging it
